allowRules.name: allow-exact-nmsrc-check
allowRules.reason: Permit this exact read-only .nmsrc validation bundle without extra confirmation.

allowRules.name: approve-one-scratch-probe
allowRules.reason: Permit this exact scratch-path probe after explicit confirmation.

denyRules.name: deny-sudo-anywhere
denyRules.reason: Force every sudo-based command through the built-in privilege review path.

allowRules.name: allow-current-schema-switch
allowRules.reason: Permit this one schema switch after explicit confirmation for NMS diagnostics.

denyRules.name: block-select-for-update
denyRules.reason: Prevent lock-taking SQL from the MCP server.
